name: pod
description: CocoaPods dependency manager for Swift and Objective-C Cocoa projects

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install project dependencies to Podfile.lock versions

options.name: --repo-update
options.description: Force running `pod repo update` before install

options.name: --clean-install
options.description: Ignore the contents of the project cache and force a full pod installation. This only applies to projects that have enabled incremental installation

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update outdated project dependencies and create new Podfile.lock

args.name: [POD_NAMES...]
args.description: Name of the pods to update

options.name: --sources
options.description: The sources from which to update dependent pods.

options.name: --clean-install
options.description: Ignore the contents of the project cache and force a full pod installation.

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Generate a Podfile for the current directory

options.name: --regex
options.description: Interpret the `QUERY` as a regular expression

options.name: --ios
options.description: Restricts the search to Pods supported on iOS

options.name: --mac
options.description: Restricts the search to Pods supported on macOS

globalOptions.name: --allow-root
globalOptions.description: Allows CocoaPods to run as root

globalOptions.name: --version
globalOptions.description: Show the version of the tool

globalOptions.name: --help
globalOptions.description: Show help banner of specified command
